facts_auth_723528853525.content: withAuth guarantees a non-null user; redundant if (!user) guards after withAuth can be removed to simplify code.

conventions_auth_723530436860.content: CSRF token endpoints intentionally skip withAuth — they validate session via x-session-id header, not JWT. This is an explicit allowlist exception, not an oversight.

facts_auth_723531928874.content: withAuth with no roles option means 'any authenticated user' — this is correct for user-specific resources where identity alone suffices.
